summary: First-pass full-stack testing of Qira Agent Usage Observatory. All 6 backend API tests PASSED (health, /api/usage/latest shape, live drift, history, projects, ingest+history append) and all frontend acceptance criteria verified end-to-end on the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py apply_drift() mutates the in-memory snapshot dict but does not persist drifted totals back to MongoDB. This is intentional (anchor-based recompute) and works, but the result is that history snapshots written via ingest contain only the moment-of-ingest totals, not the drifted live totals. Acceptable for this design.

POST /api/usage/ingest accepts arbitrary JSON with no Pydantic schema. Acceptable for a private publisher endpoint, but consider a minimal Pydantic model + optional shared-secret header before any public exposure.

CORS is allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True. FastAPI / starlette will silently downgrade credentials for wildcard origins; not a blocker for this read-only dashboard but worth pinning to the FE origin.

seed_if_empty() only runs on cold start with empty DB. If /app/public/data/latest.json is updated, the change will not flow into Mongo unless DB is wiped or POST /api/usage/ingest is called. Document this for the publisher workflow.
Frontend polls every 2s with no exponential backoff on failure; on a long outage this hammers the API. Minor.
test_credentials: N/A - public read-only dashboard, no auth
seed_data_creation: Ingest test temporarily overwrote 'latest' with a minimal payload, then restored the original /app/public/data/latest.json via a second ingest call. Verified GET /api/usage/latest after restore returns the full ~30.8B token snapshot with 2 providers and 8 projects.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_observatory_api.py and is safe to re-run (it self-restores the snapshot after ingest). The live drift test sleeps 3.2s and requires >=30,000 token delta - the rate is ~18,850 tokens/sec so this has a wide safety margin. Public URL: https://f9f1a35f-8aed-4298-b93e-8563c5b42f70.preview.emergentagent.com
